user_system_path: Issue #296 active — M1 milestone: loop closes for Brandon ≥3 days/week, 2 consecutive weeks. Make workday_presence_state always-present so Brandon always sees a real action card, never a dead setup form.
no_routing_contract: The Agent must read ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md and the active issue before acting, and must follow the active issue exactly. The Agent may not ask Brandon to route, repeat, or arbitrate.

terminal_state_authority.merge_through_rule: Merge-through is allowed only after local proof, GitHub checks green, forbidden work touched is NO, and the PR receipt records the source-truth closeout and terminal state.

allowed_files_raw: Active seam: issue #296 M1 milestone. Backend state contract (workday_presence_state always-present) and scripts/workflows for loop-health monitoring. Migrations allowed only with AGENTS.md schema discipline: committed + applied to production + verified, or exact blocker stated.
forbidden_files_raw: Acquisition/growth agents stay quarantined OFF (lib/acquisition/**). Behavioral rails regardless of file: no outbound email/sends by default, no paid tests without naming exact cost first, no fake claims (enterprise/compliance/connector breadth), no dashboard/task-list/inbox-summary drift, no raw private content in receipts, one intervention max, safe silence is a win.
required_browser_proof: Required for user-facing money-path changes: walk the affected path live (preview or e2e) and capture proof. Backend-only fixes use focused vitest + gates per AGENTS.md.
browser_proof_command: npx playwright test tests/e2e/dashboard-navigation.spec.ts tests/e2e/authenticated-routes.spec.ts tests/e2e/public-routes.spec.ts --reporter=list
acceptance_condition: Brandon closes the loop ≥3 days/week for 2 consecutive weeks (tkg_actions.approved_at stamps from real human action). workday_presence_state is always-present; loop-health guardian stays green. Receipt on issue #296.
stop_condition: Stop when M1 done-means is met with receipts on #296, or BLOCKED_WITH_EXACT_RECEIPT on a real permission/CI/safety blocker, or session limits force an exact resume receipt.
anti_regression_checks: issue #281 stays open as the external human-validation dependency — do not reopen as a code blocker, do not fake its proof
issue #276 is COMPLETE — the resolver verdict surface stays closed to exactly MERGE_READY/FIX_FIRST/WAIT/CLEAR
issue #249 is COMPLETE — scorer-winner invariant enforced in selectSourceBackedRightNowState
issue #226 is COMPLETE — rung-6 owner-path readiness proven via PR #256
issue #262 must stay event-driven — not a daily brief or dashboard summary
the Right Now acceptance standard holds: no prepared object means no interrupting card (rightNowHasPreparedObject)
root markdown file count is bounded by gate:continuity (MAX 8)
a new governance rule may only be added by editing an existing keep-list file
trusted class requires outbound evidence — inbound volume alone yields unclassified
personal class is sticky and salience-capped
acquisition/growth agents are quarantined (default OFF) until owner re-enables
next_command: M1 backend-lock: make workday_presence_state always-present on every dashboard load. Read ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md and issue #296 before acting.
